name: iFlight Nazgul Evoque V2 Frame Kit - F5D/F5X/F6D/F6X
description: The old days are over, getting your electronics full of dirt and wet grass every time you crash. Our latest frame reduces contamination that could build up on your flight controller or ESCs, preventing failure or short circuits. Strategic airflow to keep your components cool and clean without taking any shortcuts in weight or performance. Illuminated side panels and 360-degree TPU protective parts.

name: PIRAT Hook V2 FPV Drone - Caddx Vista Mounting Kit
description: This Caddx Vista Mounting Kit is specially designed for the new PIRAT Hook V2 Frame!  Crafted in high-quality 3D printing material with durable hardware.

name: Lumenier M2 Rubber Landing Feet (8pcs)
description: These Lumenier M2 Rubber Landing Feet are sure to protect your drone by providing a softer landing. Works with all drones!

name: Lumenier M3 Rubber Landing Feet (8pcs)
description: These Lumenier M3 Rubber Landing Feet are sure to protect your drone by providing a softer landing. Works with practically all drones!

name: Lumenier QAV-R 2 Deadcat Freestyle Quadcopter Frame (5", 6", 7")
description: The QAV-R 2 Deadcat Frame retracted front arms make sure your props are never in view in your camera footage. The body of the frame is also extended to give more room for mounting options such as DJI's FPV Air Unit. Fly freestyle your way with the Lumenier QAV-R 2 Deadcat Freestyle Frame.

name: Neoprene Landing Pads for Skinny Arms (4 Pack)
description: Ultralight Lumenier Neoprene Landing Pads in a skinny form factor design to fit narrow arms.

name: QAV-R 2 Main Plate

name: Lumenier QAV-R 2 Freestyle Quadcopter Frame
description: The QAV-R 2 is the worthy successor to the original QAV-R that many pilots fell in love with back in 2015. The QAV-R keeps many design elements from the original but adds modern compatibility and features that are preferred by today's pilots.

name: AOS RC O3 Freestyle FPV Frame Kit
description: Exceptional flight performance. Unparalleled versatility. Improved durability. Simple to build. Easy to maintain. This version has been specially designed to house the DJI O3 Air Unit.

name: PIRAT Hook Frame (5", 6", 7")
description: Introducing FPV Pilot Fincky's favorite frame from the French FPV brand PiratFrames!

name: PIRAT Hook V2 FPV Drone Frame Kit
description: Get a precise flying experience with the new PIRAT Hook V2 Frame! The V2 frame now features more durability (even in reverse), Caddx Vista integration, and adaptivity to all camera sizes. Developed in collaboration with PDEVX FPV pilot.

name: XILO Phreakstyle Slam Freestyle Quadcopter Frame Kit - 5"/6"/7"
description: The Phreakstyle Slam Freestyle Quadcopter Frame Kit is XILO's take on the FPV freestyle airframe. The Phreakstyle offers freestyle FPV pilots a frame with all the space and features you want - at an affordable price.

name: XILO Phreakstyle Freestyle Quadcopter Frame Kit - 5"/6"/7"
description: The Phreakstyle Quadcopter Frame Kit is XILO's take on the freestyle airframe. The Phreakstyle offers freestyle FPV pilots a frame with all the space and features you want - at an affordable price.

name: HGLRC Sector 5", 6",7" V3 HD Freestyle FPV Frame Kit
description: The HGLRC Sector 5/6/7 V3 Freestyle Frame comes in three different sizes: 5", 6", and 7". It features no props in view, so you can enjoy a clear view when flying and you can adjust the camera mount from 25°, 30°, 35° to 40° to suit your needs.

name: XILO Blue Hornet FPV Freestyle Quadcopter Frame (5",6",7")
description: The XILO Blue Hornet FPV Freestyle Quadcopter Frame. A unique carbon fiber FPV airframe designed to be ultra-durable, easy to work on, and affordable.

name: Armattan Badger DJI Edition Frame
description: The updated version of the Armattan Badger, the DJI Edition, comes with a new lipo top plate, updated camera mount, 2 custom sided 3M foams to mount the DJI Air Unit and more!

name: XILO Phreakstyle Main Plate

name: Armattan Badger Frame
description: The humble badger is the namesake of Armattan's newest flagship.  With a design based off of the Marmotte frame, the Badger updates it with removable arms: carefully designed to ensure a rock-solid construction.

name: Replacement 7075 Aluminum Plate for FLOSS 3.0

description: The QAV-R 2 Slam is the worthy successor to the original QAV-R that many pilots fell in love with back in 2015. The QAV-R keeps many design elements from the original but adds modern compatibility and features that are preferred by today's pilots.
